category.scope_note: Electric vehicle conductive charging equipment comparison.

title.en: China-to-Saudi Arabia EV Charger Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国电动汽车充电桩进入沙特阿拉伯：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國電動汽車充電樁進入沙特阿拉伯：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China EV charger documentation against Saudi Arabia SASO technical regulations, SABER conformity assessment requirements, IEC 61851 safety standards, IEC 62196 connector standards, SEC grid code (60 Hz), and CISPR EMC requirements.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国电动汽车充电桩文件与沙特阿拉伯SASO技术法规、SABER合格评定要求、IEC 61851安全标准、IEC 62196接口标准、SEC电网规范（60Hz）及CISPR电磁兼容要求差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國電動汽車充電樁文件與沙特阿拉伯SASO技術法規、SABER合格評定要求、IEC 61851安全標準、IEC 62196接口標準、SEC電網規範（60Hz）及CISPR電磁相容要求差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, conformity assessment body assessment, electrical-installation design, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, and installers should verify current Saudi Arabia SASO technical regulations, SABER platform requirements, SEC grid connection rules, connector standards, and EMC requirements with qualified professionals and directly with SASO (saso.gov.sa) and the SABER platform (saber.sa) before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、合格评定机构评审、电气安装设计、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商和安装方在出货或安装前应与合格专业人士核验，并直接向SASO（saso.gov.sa）及SABER平台（saber.sa）核实当前沙特阿拉伯SASO技术法规、SABER平台要求、SEC电网接入规则、接口标准及电磁兼容要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、合格評定機構評審、電氣安裝設計、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商和安裝方在出貨或安裝前應與合格專業人士核驗，並直接向SASO（saso.gov.sa）及SABER平台（saber.sa）核實當前沙特阿拉伯SASO技術法規、SABER平台要求、SEC電網接入規則、接口標準及電磁相容要求。

answer_first.en: SABER PCoC/SCoC market access, IEC 62196-2 Type 2 connector incompatibility (vs. GB/T 20234), 60 Hz grid frequency (vs. China 50 Hz), and SASO EMC re-testing are the major Saudi Arabia gaps compared with Chinese GB/T EV-charger compliance.
answer_first.zh: 相较中国GB/T充电桩合规，SABER PCoC/SCoC市场准入、IEC 62196-2 Type 2接口不兼容（对比GB/T 20234）、60Hz电网频率（对比中国50Hz）以及SASO电磁兼容重新检测，是进入沙特阿拉伯的主要差距。
answer_first.zht: 相較中國GB/T充電樁合規，SABER PCoC/SCoC市場准入、IEC 62196-2 Type 2接口不相容（對比GB/T 20234）、60Hz電網頻率（對比中國50Hz）以及SASO電磁相容重新檢測，是進入沙特阿拉伯的主要差距。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, conformity assessment body, customs authority, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
